series_metadata.series_title: Captains Weekly/Quarterly Reports of Dredge Operations and Projects
series_metadata.series_description: This series contains records generally associated with Captains' reports that track production from dredge operations and dredging projects. This series includes but is not limited to: weekly reports of daily operations (which includes starting, stopping, delays and causes), quarterly compilations of weekly reports and other related records. the quarterly compilation compiles the weekly dredge operations and projects, plus estimates the cost of dredging and heavy equipment operations.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for 2 years after the State-wide financial statement audit and Agency/Department-wide audit are conducted by the State Auditor. If paper records are scanned to an electronic format, the paper records may be destroyed at that time. ; Electronic: Retain for 2 years after the State-wide financial statement audit and Agency/Department-wide audit are conducted by the State Auditor., Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Delete
